title: cheilanthes neglecta
intro: Cheilanthes neglecta, also known as the rustyback or rusty-leaved cliff brake, is a species of fern native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cheilanthes neglecta include its potential to treat various health conditions such as respiratory issues, skin irritations, and digestive problems. Cheilanthes neglecta can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
